messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-585 — Pipeline board: one matrix with ticket COLUMNS and shared role rows, epic as a per-ticket caption, plus the grid's first width budget
Approval context: The layout change itself is exactly what you asked for and needs no sign-off.
Four things do:

1. THE WIDTH BUDGET IS 30 CHARACTERS, which fits 7 ticket columns at today's
   3-digit ids (2 for the role label + 4 per column). Past that the matrix
   drops the tail and prints "+N more active". This …
BL-585 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-585" (or "reject BL-585 <reason>") to act.
